title: Stage Diff Log
description: Stored at output/diff-log.json within each stage program. Append-only. Tracks all proposed and applied changes to the stage's contract or routing rules.

diff_id.description: Unique ID for this diff. Format: diff-[stage_id]-[sequence-number]. Example: diff-data-store-001

stage_id.description: The stage this diff applies to.

proposed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the improvement engine proposed this diff.

change_type.description: Category of change. Determines default risk_level (see risk_level field).

risk_level.description: low-risk = auto-apply eligible. high-impact = human review required. Any change to contract Inputs, Outputs, or Process steps is always high-impact.

description.description: Plain English: what changes, why, and what improvement is expected.

target_file.description: Path of the file to be changed, relative to workspace root.

before.description: Exact text to be replaced. Must match current file content exactly at time of application.

evidence.description: Array of run_id values from telemetry that triggered this diff. At least 1 required.

status.description: proposed = awaiting review or auto-apply. validated = human approved, not yet applied. applied = change written to file. rejected = human declined.

applied_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the diff was applied. Only present when status = applied.

rejected_reason.description: Optional. Human-provided reason for rejection. Only present when status = rejected.
